summary: Technical discussion of the Ultra‑Matrix source; recording method explained but no musical appraisal
review: The lone review focuses on how the Ultra‑Matrix tape was created—mixing a delayed FOH soundboard feed with audience mics—and does not comment on performance or song quality. The reviewer gives a neutral three‑star rating, indicating an average perception of the recording’s value.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review discussing recording technique; no performance data, so rating reflects an average overall impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review explains Ultra‑Matrix process (FOH SBD delayed to match audience feed, mixed onto cassette); no direct comments on clarity or mix quality.
